inputs.price_source: Yahoo Finance TASE.TA close 2026-06-11 (14530 agorot = NIS 145.30)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2024 net profit NIS 101.4M / 92.444M basic shares (~NIS 1.10 EPS) haircut ~5% for reinvestment; PR Newswire earnings release 2025-03-04
inputs.normalization_note: FY2024 mid-cycle base; strong TA-125 index (+29% in 2024) lifts activity but not inflated into starting cash until FY2025 annual PDF on disk

bear.notes: Israel market volume mean-reversion; fee caps; multiple compression from rich starting multiple

base.notes: Data/connectivity mix (+28% FY24) and trading commissions (+7%); exit near high-teens cash-flow multiple implied at price

bull.notes: Sustained listing activity, MAOF clearing growth, index licensing; limited competitive entry

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light exchange; no land or royalty NAV pattern in FY2024 release

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Regulated market infrastructure toll on volume and data

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: FY2024 net profit NIS 101.4M on revenue NIS 437.9M (PR Newswire 2025-03-04)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in cash path?
option_scan.evidence: Transaction and listing fees recognized with market activity

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Listed exchange operator since demutualization; no holdco thesis

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Regular dividend (NIS 51M proposed for FY2024, 50% payout); operating model

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Data distribution and connectivity revenue +28% FY24; MAOF clearing and dual-listing services embedded in growth path

option_scan.question: Material separate option terminals required?
option_scan.evidence: Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient after scan

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
